allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const html=fs.readFileSync\(''dist/DevSecOps_VulnAnalyzer.html'',''utf8''\); console.log\(''darkMode state:'', html.includes\(''useState\(true\)''\)\); console.log\(''data-theme attr:'', html.includes\(''data-theme=''\)\); console.log\(''CSS vars block:'', html.includes\(''[data-theme=""dark""]''\)\); console.log\(''Toggle button:'', html.includes\(''Cambiar a modo claro''\)\); console.log\(''bg-base var:'', html.includes\(''var\(--bg-base\)''\)\); console.log\(''accent var:'', html.includes\(''var\(--accent\)''\)\); console.log\(''darkMode prop passed:'', \(html.match\(/darkMode=\\{darkMode\\}/g\)||[]\).length\);")
